fields.name: Name
fields.nameTitle: Letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores. With a letter or number, start it must.
fields.cpuRequestTitle: Kubernetes CPU quantity, this is: whole cores (1, 2) or millicores (500m, 100m)
fields.memoryRequestTitle: Kubernetes memory quantity, this is: bytes (1000) or with suffix (512Mi, 2Gi, 1Ti)
fields.versionTitle: In X.Y or X.Y.Z format, the version must be (e.g. 1.11 or 1.11.5)
fields.terragruntVersionTitle: In X.Y or X.Y.Z format, the Terragrunt version must be (e.g. 1.0)
fields.vcsRepositoryTitle: An HTTP or HTTPS URL, it must be
fields.labelsTitle: Double duty, workspace labels do: label-based RBAC matching, and as the "tags" matched by terraform/tofu cloud '{' workspaces '{' tags = ... '}' '}' blocks.
fields.triggerPrefixesHint: Directories that trigger runs, these are. When set, working directory filtering overrides it.
fields.driftIgnoreRulesHint: Glob-aware Terraform address + attribute paths, by the drift classifier suppressed. Zero or more non-<dot></dot> chars, <star></star> matches (spans <n></n> indices); any bracketed index, <starIdx></starIdx> matches. A bare address with no attribute suffix, any change to that resource silences it — including destroys. Drift only, this affects, not regular plan/apply. For the full grammar, <docs>drift-ignore-rules.md</docs> see.
fields.driftIgnoreRulesNone: None (as drift, every plan diff counts)
